title: Calyxa — Turn AI into your tutor, not your shortcut.
excerpt: Calyxa sees the problem on your screen and talks you through it — never the answer, just the step you're missing.
content_html:
calyxa

Stop copying. Start learning.

Your Adaptive AI tutor that teaches directly on any homework, website, or PDF.

Add to Chrome — free

Works on Khan Academy, Canvas, Google Classroom & more.

Compatible with

Canvas

Compatible with Canvas, Khan Academy, MyLab Math, DeltaMath, WebAssign, AP Classroom, Google Classroom.

Stop copying. Start learning.

Your Adaptive AI tutor that teaches directly on any homework, website, or PDF.

Add to Chrome — free

sees this page

scripted demo — the real calyxa floats over your actual homework tab

getting unstuck

Skip the copy-paste loop.

one sentence does what used to take eight steps — and this time you actually learn it.

Before1 / 8 steps

1 1Screenshot the problem2 2Open a new chat3 3Paste it in4 4Type where you're stuck5 5Read the full solution6 6Copy it down7 7Turn it in8 8Miss the same step on the test

~10 minutes of screenshot-and-paste busywork to hand in an answer you can't explain — you end up cheating and learning nothing.

After1 step

“hey calyxa — I'm stuck on 2b.”

2bx² − 5x + 6 = 0your page

✚ Coachingalready looking at 2b — what did you try first?

seconds to ask, zero busywork — you think it through and actually understand the concept your test needs.

one session

Everything a tutor does, in one session.

it draws on the problem itself, talks you through it out loud, and leaves a study kit behind when you're done.

labeled marks and a why-note — on the page you already have open.

It draws on the problem itself.

labeled marks on the terms it's talking about, and a why-note for the step — on the page you already have open. when it says “the middle term,” you can see exactly which term it means.

mathpath.example.edu/unit-4mathpath.example.educalyxa active

Problem 2 · factor

x² + 5xthey add to +5 + 6they multiply to +6 = 0

✚ Coachingyou're looking for two numbers that do both jobs at once. what pair could that be?

✚ Coaching

摆脱困境

跳过复制粘贴循环。

过去需要八个步骤的事情只需一句话就能完成——这一次你真的学会了。

之前 1 / 8 步骤

1 1问题屏幕截图2 2打开一个新的聊天3 3将其粘贴到4 4键入您遇到困难的地方5 5阅读完整的解决方案6 6将其复制下来7 7将其输入8 8错过测试中的同一步骤

大约 10 分钟的屏幕截图和粘贴工作，交出一个你无法解释的答案——你最终会作弊，却什么也没学到。

1步后

“嘿，calyxa——我被困在 2b 了。”

2bx² − 5x + 6 = 0您的页面

✚ 教练已经在考虑 2b——你首先尝试了什么？

秒问，零忙碌——你仔细思考并真正理解你的测试所需的概念。

一次会议

导师所做的一切都在一次会议中完成。

它利用问题本身，大声地告诉你它，并在你完成后留下一个学习工具包。

标记标记和原因说明 - 在您已打开的页面上。

它借鉴了问题本身。

在您已经打开的页面上，在所讨论的术语上加上标记，以及该步骤的原因注释。 当它说“中间项”时，您可以准确地看到它的含义。
